nasb.text: These four were born to the giant in Gath, and they fell by the hand of David and by the hand of his servants.

esv.text: These four were descended from the giants in Gath, and they fell by the hand of David and by the hand of his servants.

cnv.text: 以上這四個人都是迦特城裡那個巨人所生的，都死在大衛和大衛臣僕的手下。

ccb.text: 这四个迦特巨人的后裔都死在大卫和他的部下手里。
